docs:
# Badge
Compact status chips for labels, release notes, or category tags.
## Import
```tsx
import { Badge } from "@/components/ui/badge";
```
## Usage
```tsx
<Badge variant="gradient">New release</Badge>
```
## Props
- **label** (string) — default: `"New release"`: Label
- **variant** (string) — default: `"gradient"`: Variant
Some Aurora UI components use custom Tailwind animations (animate-shimmer, animate-marquee, animate-aurora, etc.). Merge keyframes from https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Rydaguy101/aurora-ui/main/tailwind.config.ts into your tailwind.config.
## Install
```bash
npx aurora-ui-cli add badge
# or with shadcn CLI (after aurora-ui init):
npx shadcn@latest add @aurora/badge
```
